meaning: n.[鐢焆杩滀氦,寮傚瀷鏉備氦
examples: A combination of dichogamy and herkogamy in hermaphroditic plants is an effective mechanism to encourage outcrossing.
Spraying GA3 reasonable can be increased to improve the height, outcrossing rate and yield.
It has good outcrossing characteristics and early flowering time with its outcrossing rate over 50%.
